title: 075  How can we be jealous of Krishna
speaker: HH Stoka Krishna Maharaj

segments.text: But the fact is that there is a personality whose part and parcel we are all.
Entire existence is for Him, Anandamayobhyasat.
We don't have to feel envious about it.
Because if you say the hand is part and parcel of this body,
and the hand is all working for the body,
the hand won't feel envious of why should I work for the body.
The hand is hand. My role I am doing, I am getting nourished.
The total system is one harmonious system.
So in the similar way, the total existence, according to Chaitanya Mahaprabhu's philosophy,
understanding is Achintya Vedat Veda Tattva.
The total existence is Krishna.
Only Krishna exists.
Just like you say, only body exists.
We won't separately say hand exists and all that.
In that body exists, hand is included, finger is included, every part is included.
Therefore only Krishna exists.
And everything else is Himself personally or is energy.
You cannot meet anything else in existence.
Go left side, right side, up, down, everywhere.
Only you can meet either Krishna or Krishna's energy.
